category_sources: Official tmuxp documentation describes the project as tmuxp documentation for installing and using tmuxp.
source_facts.description says tmuxp is a tmux session manager built on libtmux.
display_name_sources: Official documentation page title is tmuxp.
docs_sources: Official tmuxp docs homepage is hosted at tmuxp.git-pull.com.
source_facts.homepage is the official tmuxp documentation site.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository is tmux-python/tmuxp and identifies itself as the tmuxp project source.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository describes tmuxp as a session manager for tmux built on libtmux.
source_facts.description identifies a tmux session manager.
